# UX/UI Design Requirements Quality Checklist: ITSM Frontend

**Purpose**: Validate completeness, clarity, and consistency of frontend UI/UX requirements across 111 pages
**Created**: 2026-06-13
**Feature**: [ITSM Frontend Design System](https://github.com/heidsoft/itsm/tree/main/itsm-frontend)
**Context**: 111 pages, design-system.css, theme-variables.css, Tailwind v4

**Note**: This checklist is generated by the `/speckit-checklist` command. Items test requirements quality, NOT implementation.

---

## Requirement Completeness

- [ ] CHK001 - Is the design token system (theme-variables.css) documented with all color, typography, and spacing values explicitly named and defined? [Completeness, design-system.css]
- [ ] CHK002 - Are button variant requirements (primary, secondary, outline, ghost, danger) each specified with exact visual properties (colors, shadows, border radii)? [Completeness, design-system.css §Button Variants]
- [ ] CHK003 - Are status tag requirements (open, in-progress, resolved, closed, cancelled) defined with specific color pairs (background + text) for each state? [Completeness, design-system.css §Status Tags]
- [ ] CHK004 - Are priority tag requirements (low, medium, high, urgent) defined with distinct, non-overlapping color semantics? [Completeness, design-system.css §Priority Tags]
- [ ] CHK005 - Are type tag requirements (incident, service-request, problem, change) defined with distinct visual treatment? [Completeness, design-system.css §Type Tags]
- [ ] CHK006 - Is the loading spinner animation specified (duration, easing, color)? [Completeness, design-system.css §Loading States]
- [ ] CHK007 - Are empty state requirements defined with icon, title, and description slot specifications? [Completeness, design-system.css §Empty States]
- [ ] CHK008 - Are error state requirements defined with icon, title, and description specifications? [Completeness, design-system.css §Error States]
- [ ] CHK009 - Are success state requirements defined with icon, title, and description specifications? [Completeness, design-system.css §Success States]
- [ ] CHK010 - Are form input interaction states (hover, focus, invalid) each specified with color transitions? [Completeness, design-system.css §Form Elements]
- [x] CHK011 - Is a dark mode / theme variant specification defined for all color tokens? [Completeness, RESOLVED F3] — T108: All semantic color scales (warning/error/success/info) added to both `.dark` and `:root:not(.light)` sections in globals.css; `--color-bg-elevated` CSS variable added for elevated surfaces (tooltips/popovers/dropdowns)
- [ ] CHK012 - Are component prop API specifications defined for all reusable UI components (StatCard, FilterToolbarCard, LoadingSkeleton, etc.)? [Completeness, Gap]
- [ ] CHK013 - Is the animation specification (fade-in, slide-up, scale-in) defined with duration, easing, and trigger conditions? [Completeness, design-system.css §Animation Utilities]
- [ ] CHK014 - Are modal/dialog requirements defined with header, body, footer slot specifications and overlay behavior? [Completeness, design-system.css §Modal Styles]
- [ ] CHK015 - Is table component behavior (striped rows, hover row color, pagination styling) defined? [Completeness, design-system.css §Table Styles]

## Requirement Clarity

- [ ] CHK016 - Is "hover:shadow-md" in btn-primary quantified with specific shadow values? [Clarity, design-system.css §Button Variants]
- [ ] CHK017 - Is "transition-all duration-200" specified as a consistent standard across all interactive elements? [Clarity, design-system.css]
- [ ] CHK018 - Are font size requirements specified with explicit px/rem values for all text hierarchy levels (title, subtitle, body, caption)? [Clarity, Gap]
- [ ] CHK019 - Is "shadow-sm" vs "shadow-md" vs "shadow-lg" usage criteria documented — which component types use which shadow level? [Clarity, design-system.css]
- [ ] CHK020 - Are border radius values specified as explicit numbers (4px, 8px, 12px) rather than arbitrary Tailwind scale names? [Clarity, design-system.css]
- [ ] CHK021 - Is the "interactive" card variant defined with specific interaction triggers (hover only, or hover + focus)? [Clarity, design-system.css §Card Variants]
- [ ] CHK022 - Are z-index values specified for overlapping elements (modals, tooltips, dropdowns, loading overlays) with a defined stacking order? [Clarity, globals.css]
- [ ] CHK023 - Is the "stats-card" gradient direction (to-br, to-r) specified as the standard and not mixed with other directions? [Clarity, design-system.css §Statistics Cards]
- [ ] CHK024 - Is the spacing scale documented (gap-3 vs gap-4 vs gap-6 usage rules)? [Clarity, design-system.css]
- [ ] CHK025 - Are icon size requirements specified for each usage context (button icons, stat card icons, empty state icons)? [Clarity, Gap]

## Requirement Consistency

- [ ] CHK026 - Are card variant requirements consistent between .card-default, .card-elevated, and .card-interactive — do they share or diverge intentionally on border/shadow properties? [Consistency, design-system.css §Card Variants]
- [ ] CHK027 - Are focus ring requirements consistent across all interactive elements (input, button, dropdown)? [Consistency, design-system.css §Focus States]
- [ ] CHK028 - Are transition duration values consistent — is "duration-200" used everywhere or are there exceptions (duration-300 for stats-card hover)? [Consistency, design-system.css]
- [ ] CHK029 - Are form input border colors consistent across hover/focus/invalid states? [Consistency, design-system.css §Form Elements]
- [ ] CHK030 - Are error icon (text-red-500) and success icon (text-green-500) color requirements consistent in sizing (h-12 w-12)? [Consistency, design-system.css §Error/Success States]
- [x] CHK031 - Are status tags and priority tags using overlapping color semantics (orange used for both status-open and priority-high) — is this intentional or a conflict? [Conflict, RESOLVED F2] — T103: priority-high changed from orange-100/orange-800 to amber-100/amber-800; tailwind.config.mjs added explicit amber and orange color scales; status-open retains orange, priority-high now uses amber — non-overlapping
- [ ] CHK032 - Is the filter-bar gradient specification (from-gray-50 to-white) consistent with other gradient usage in the system? [Consistency, design-system.css §Filter Bar]
- [ ] CHK033 - Are responsive utilities (.mobile-hidden, .desktop-hidden) defined with specific breakpoint values? [Consistency, design-system.css §Responsive Utilities]

## Accessibility Requirements

- [ ] CHK034 - Are keyboard focus visibility requirements defined for all interactive elements? [Accessibility, design-system.css §Focus States]
- [ ] CHK035 - Are color contrast requirements specified for all text-on-background combinations (especially status tags on colored backgrounds)? [Accessibility, Gap]
- [ ] CHK036 - Are ARIA role requirements defined for custom interactive components (filter bar, stats cards, action bar)? [Accessibility, Gap]
- [ ] CHK037 - Is reduced-motion preference handling defined for all animations (fade-in, slide-up, hover-lift, hover-scale)? [Accessibility, animations.css]
- [ ] CHK038 - Are focus trap requirements defined for modal/dialog components? [Accessibility, design-system.css §Modal Styles]
- [ ] CHK039 - Is there a screen reader label specification for icon-only buttons? [Accessibility, Gap]

## Visual Quality / Anti-Template Policy

- [ ] CHK040 - Does the design spec define intentional visual hierarchy for the dashboard (StatCard ordering, color weight distribution) or is layout left to default arrangement? [Clarity, Gap]
- [ ] CHK041 - Are "bento" or editorial layout requirements specified for any primary views, or is the default card grid the only defined layout pattern? [Completeness, Gap]
- [ ] CHK042 - Are hover state visual treatments defined as "designed" (specific color shifts, transforms) rather than browser defaults? [Completeness, design-system.css]
- [ ] CHK043 - Does the design system define intentional typography pairing (font family choices, weight hierarchy) beyond Tailwind defaults? [Completeness, Gap]
- [ ] CHK044 - Are loading overlay opacity and blur requirements specified with exact values, not just "bg-opacity-75"? [Clarity, design-system.css §Loading Overlay]

## Responsive Design

- [ ] CHK045 - Are mobile breakpoint behavior requirements defined for the filter bar (collapse to drawer vs inline)? [Responsive, design-system.css §Filter Bar]
- [ ] CHK046 - Is the action bar responsive behavior specified for small screens (flex-col stacking order)? [Responsive, design-system.css §Action Bar]
- [ ] CHK047 - Are table horizontal scroll vs column collapse requirements defined for mobile viewports? [Responsive, design-system.css §Table Styles]
- [ ] CHK048 - Is modal width behavior specified for mobile vs desktop (full-screen drawer vs centered modal)? [Responsive, design-system.css §Modal Styles]
- [ ] CHK049 - Are stat card grid column count requirements defined for each breakpoint (mobile: 1, tablet: 2, desktop: 4)? [Responsive, Gap]

## Edge Case Coverage

- [ ] CHK050 - Is the fallback behavior defined when a stat card value is null or zero? [Edge Case, design-system.css §Statistics Cards]
- [ ] CHK051 - Is the empty state display behavior defined when a list returns zero items? [Edge Case, design-system.css §Empty States]
- [ ] CHK052 - Is the form input error state defined with a specific error border color and error message placement? [Edge Case, design-system.css §Form Elements]
- [ ] CHK053 - Is the table row overflow behavior defined for long text content (ellipsis vs wrapping)? [Edge Case, design-system.css §Table Styles]
- [ ] CHK054 - Is the dropdown menu position clamping defined when near viewport edges? [Edge Case, globals.css]

## Interaction State Coverage

- [ ] CHK055 - Are disabled button state visual requirements defined (opacity, cursor, pointer-events)? [Completeness, Gap]
- [ ] CHK056 - Are loading button state requirements defined (spinner position, disabled behavior, label change)? [Completeness, Gap]
- [ ] CHK057 - Are selected/active filter chip state requirements defined? [Completeness, Gap]
- [ ] CHK058 - Are expanded/collapsed accordion state transition requirements defined? [Completeness, Gap]
- [ ] CHK059 - Is the "hover-lift" transform magnitude (-translate-y-1) specified as the standard across all hover-lift elements? [Consistency, design-system.css §Hover States]

## Non-Functional Requirements

- [ ] CHK060 - Are CSS bundle size budget requirements defined for the design system (max kb for globals.css, design-system.css)? [Performance, Gap]
- [ ] CHK061 - Are Tailwind purge rules specified to prevent unused design tokens from shipping to production? [Performance, Gap]
- [ ] CHK062 - Are animation performance requirements defined (compositor-friendly properties only, no layout-triggering animations)? [Performance, design-system.css §Animation Utilities]

## Dependencies & Assumptions

- [ ] CHK063 - Is the assumption that Ant Design v5 component tokens override globals.css documented and validated? [Assumption]
- [ ] CHK064 - Is the Tailwind v4 migration impact on existing design system classes documented? [Dependency, Gap]
- [ ] CHK065 - Are font loading requirements (font-display: swap, preload for critical fonts) specified? [Dependency, Gap]

## Ambiguities & Conflicts

- [ ] CHK066 - Is the term "shadow-sm" consistently used across all card types, or are there exceptions where shadow is omitted? [Ambiguity, design-system.css]
- [ ] CHK067 - Is "rounded-lg" confirmed as the standard border-radius across all components, or do exceptions exist? [Ambiguity, design-system.css]
- [x] CHK068 - Do status tag colors conflict with priority tag colors in a way that causes visual confusion on the same view? [Conflict, RESOLVED F2] — T103: Same fix as CHK031; priority-high → amber-100/amber-800, status-open → orange-100/orange-800, stats orange → amber-*, all non-overlapping
- [ ] CHK069 - Is the "bg-gray-50" in filter-bar gradient vs "bg-gray-50" in table-header the same semantic usage or different? [Ambiguity, design-system.css]

---

## Notes

- Items test requirements quality, not implementation correctness
- `[Gap]` = requirement not found in current spec
- `[Ambiguity]` = term may have multiple meanings
- `[Conflict]` = requirements contradict each other
- `[Assumption]` = unverified assumption in the design
